nasb.text: When Balak heard that Balaam was coming, he went out to meet him at the city of Moab, which is on the Arnon border, at the extreme end of the border.

esv.text: When Balak heard that Balaam had come, he went out to meet him at the city of Moab, on the border formed by the Arnon, at the extremity of the border.

cnv.text: 巴勒聽見巴蘭來了，就出去到摩押的京城迎接他；這城是在亞嫩河旁，在邊界的盡頭。

ccb.text: 巴勒听见巴兰来了，就来到边界尽头、亚嫩河边的摩押城迎接他。
